chapter.notFoundHint: Go back to the home page to find a chapter.

cheatSheet.title: Candlestick Cheat Sheet
cheatSheet.pathDescription: Use the cheat sheet for review, but learn in this order: analysis framework first, candle syntax second, and confluence with price levels after that.

home.title: Learn Japanese Candlestick Techniques
home.subtitle: An interactive guide based on Steve Nison's classic work
home.pathTitle: Learn the reading process before memorising shapes
home.pathDescription: Start with trend, location, and confirmation. Then learn body and shadow syntax. Only after that should you stack named reversal patterns.
home.recognitionPathTitle: Learn to spot the shape families first
home.recognitionPathDescription: Use this path when you still need pattern recognition reps. It moves from the simplest single-candle structures to the most common reversal groups.
home.analysisPathTitle: Learn to read context before naming patterns
home.analysisPathDescription: Use this path when you want to think like a chart reader. It emphasises context, location, confirmation, continuation, and confluence.

switchTo.red-up: Switch candlestick colors to red up / green down
switchTo.green-up: Switch candlestick colors to green up / red down

switchedTo.red-up: Switched to red up / green down
switchedTo.green-up: Switched to green up / red down

realChart.submitToContinue: Submit your read before revealing the next candle.

realChart.correctCheckpoint: You landed on the best takeaway.
